scripts.build: bun run embed && bun build src/main.mjs --compile --outfile dist/wrb && bun run copy-monaco
scripts.build:linux-x64: bun run embed && bun build src/main.mjs --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/wrb-linux-x64 && bun run copy-monaco
scripts.check: node --check src/main.mjs && zsh -n scripts/wrb-dev && bun run test
